title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo – CLI and Go library for pulling, running, and chatting with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc. locally via a REST/OpenAI-compatible API.

title: ollama-js
summary: First-party JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama API; works in Node or browsers via fetch.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client; sync & async chat/generate/embed endpoints, pip install ollama.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration letting you use Ollama models as LLMs, embedders, or tool callers in any LangChain pipeline.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Full-featured ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama; markdown, code highlight, multi-chat, model manager.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust TUI client for Ollama with REPL, conversation history, and syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into a free local GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with Spring Boot starters and Android compatibility.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; simple chat & generate wrappers.

title: ollama-ex
summary: Elixir wrapper for Ollama with GenServer-backed process pools.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Zig client library for Ollama with cross-compilation to bare-metal targets.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained .NET SDK for Ollama; supports .NET 6+ and Blazor samples.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Optimized multi-stage Dockerfile for CUDA and ROCm with one-line docker run examples.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an Ollama sidebar for summarizing notes and Q&A over your vault.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake that builds Ollama statically and exposes a NixOS module for declarative model caches.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset, allowing Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-ray
summary: Ray Serve deployment example that horizontally scales Ollama containers across GPU nodes.

title: ollama-django
summary: Reusable Django app adding Ollama chat endpoints, admin widgets, and async SSE streams.

title: ollama-nextjs
summary: Next.js 14 starter with server-side streaming, Vercel AI SDK, and Docker compose for local Ollama.
